title: Backup Validation Start Schema
description: Initial validation results from validate_input step, confirming all resources are readable and valid before backup creation begins

validation_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when validation was performed

decision_id.description: Phase 5 confirmation decision ID from decision-handler

total_resources.description: Total number of resources to back up

resources_by_type.description: Resource count grouped by entity_type (e.g., CloudVM, RDS, K8sDeployment)
